summary: ANDROID 🟥 Changes to some options are not properly propagated between mobile and PC part 2
scenario: Voice prompt and tone option changes are not properly synchronized between mobile and PC platforms via bitmasks
description_clean: Changes to some options (Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore) are not properly propagated between mobile and PC when changed in Device Settings > Voice Prompts & Tones. Both platforms should use bitmasks correctly to ensure changes on one platform are propagated to every other platform.
steps: 3. Change any of the following options: Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore.
4. Observe the change on the PC platform.
5. Repeat steps 1-4 but start from PC and observe the change on mobile.
expected: Changes made to any of the listed options on one platform (mobile or PC) should be correctly propagated to the other platform using proper bitmask handling.
actual: Changes to some options (Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore) are not properly propagated between mobile and PC when changed in Device Settings > Voice Prompts & Tones.
